name: crucible
description: A decision-quality engine. Brainstorm an idea (or several) into clear briefs, stress-test each through a five-advisor panel, pass it through a Decision Gate of verifiable checks (no fabricated scores), and get a decision-first verdict with a falsifiable kill criterion so you decide. Includes a fast Quick Check for low-stakes calls. Human-in-the-loop, with a Parking Lot so no promising idea is lost.
